svg.title: Quant AI Agent Full System Architecture
svg.desc: Five-layer architecture: Web App, MCP Server, LLM Agent, Training Pipeline, and Data Infrastructure

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should the chat UI look like for a quant AI agent?')
sendPrompt('What does the live market dashboard component show?')
sendPrompt('What does the strategy explorer show?')
sendPrompt('What is the backtest results panel?')
sendPrompt('What tools does the MCP server expose to the AI agent?')
sendPrompt('How does the strategy retrieval tool work in the MCP server?')
sendPrompt('What does the run_backtest MCP tool do?')
sendPrompt('What does the analyse_greeks MCP tool return?')

g.text: LLM agent — your fine-tuned model + RAG

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the fine-tuned Mistral 7B model work as a quant agent?')
sendPrompt('How does the RAG layer retrieve relevant strategy chunks?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent orchestration layer work with LangChain?')

g.text: Training pipeline — build your own model

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I create a strategy knowledge base for LLM fine-tuning?')
sendPrompt('How do I fine-tune Mistral 7B with LoRA using QLoRA?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a Qdrant RAG pipeline with BGE-M3 embeddings?')
sendPrompt('How do I serve a fine-tuned LLM with vLLM or Ollama?')
sendPrompt('How do I ingest live NSE options chain data with Python?')
sendPrompt('How do I store historical OHLCV data for Indian markets in PostgreSQL?')
sendPrompt('How do I structure my strategy knowledge base as JSON?')
sendPrompt('What infrastructure do I need for a quant AI agent app?')
